ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the standard is applicable (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the standard (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standard */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the standard (e.g., active, inactive, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_definitions" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size definition */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code (e.g., 0, 2, 4) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size definition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size definition */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the size definition is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_definitions_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size definition */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "rise" REAL /* Rise measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measurement */,
  "measurement_system" TEXT /* Type of measurement system (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_definitions ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "source_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source size standard */,
  "target_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target size standard */,
  "source_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source size */,
  "target_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the conversion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the conversion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the conversion is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_source_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_source_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_size_id") REFERENCES size_definitions ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_target_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_target_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_size_id") REFERENCES size_definitions ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type (e.g., T-shirt, Jeans) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the product is active */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the product (e.g., men, women, children) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size definition */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the product size is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_definitions ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, designer, quality control) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., product management, design, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table name of the accessed data */,
  "accessed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed data in the table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guide */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "guide_name" TEXT /* Name of the size guide (e.g., Women's T-shirt Size Guide) */,
  "guide_description" TEXT /* Description of the size guide */,
  "guide_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the size guide document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size guide was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size guide */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the size guide is active */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the size guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product size */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point to trigger a restock */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the inventory record is active */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the inventory record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
